title: Extra Carpets
description: Adds 82 new patterned carpets, such as checks, spirals, themed designs and references to other games and mods.
body:
**Do you ever just kinda lose the plot and make a Minecraft mod purely to add unnecessary amounts of carpets? No? Well GOOD FOR YOU however I did so here it is - enjoy!**

All 82 carpets have recipes and behave like vanilla carpets, including tags and flammability.

More carpets might be added in future, as well as updates to new versions or possibly ports to Fabric, but it depends if this is actually a mod people end up using, I don't know how many people will want loads of extra carpets.

### Technical info: ###
Mod should be very lightweight since it only adds blocks and a creative tab for them. All the blocks use the same block class, which itself is an extension of the vanilla carpet block class, all the modded carpet class changes from the vanilla one is it makes the modded carpets drop themselves, rather than needing a separate loot table for each one, and handles the flammability.

### Contents: ### 
Chequered patterned carpets
Spiral patterned carpets
Dimension patterned carpets (depicts dimensions from a few other mods as well as the vanilla ones)
Diamond patterned carpets
Miscellaneous patterned carpets (all sorts of miscellaneous patterns) 
Game patterned carpets (Only Geometry Dash themed ones so far) 

![Carpets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6025336cc6a5779279800c728b863635ab1dcb9.png)
The carpets also have custom item models so if you place one in an item frame it will appear normal sized - useful for hidden doors, paintings or wallpaper.
![Carpets in item frames](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b4426f4a77ab5c70ed6f0b731b98bcf2ee4394c.png)
Reposts to sites like nine minecraft will get DMCAd, idc if it's a carpet mod you ain't pinching my stuff.
